title: The Great Guess-timator
short_description: Estimate FAST — jellybean jars and rough sums. Close guesses make the crowd gasp; wild ones make the turban spin.
description: Madame Approximata, the carnival mind-reader, challenges you to estimate FAST: how many jellybeans in the jar? ROUGHLY what is 48 + 53? There's no time to count — slide to your best guess before the timer runs out. The closer you are, the louder the crowd gasps; wildly wrong guesses make her turban spin. Grade bands ramp from small jars and easy sums to huge jars and multiplication estimates. A free online estimation and number-sense game for kids in grades 1–5 — closeness scoring means every round earns points that feed your score and GP.
controls: Drag the slider to your estimate, then press Lock in my guess before the timer runs out.
